| v4.99.59 | Environment Strategy — formalized the path from local → preview → prod before launch (critical: a bad prod migration could kill the brand). New ENVIRONMENT_STRATEGY.md is the single source of truth: 3 right-sized tiers (Local `http.server`+UAT → per-PR Preview = Vercel preview ⇄ ephemeral Supabase branch DB, dev+stage+UAT collapsed into one auto-provisioned stack → Production `main` → Vercel prod ⇄ Supabase prod w/ PITR). GitHub is the control plane (branch=environment selector, PR=the gate, Actions=test tier, branch protection=enforcement). Risk-tiered gating: fast trunk-based lane unchanged for ~90% low-risk (UI/copy/exemplars/docs); gated lane (feature branch → PR → Supabase branch DB + Vercel preview + CI → self-sign-off → squash-merge) for ~10% brand-killers — any `supabase/migrations/*`, `landing/api/{stripe,ai,diagnostic}/*`, `auth-state.js`/`cloud-store.js`/`lib/supabase.js`, `sw.js`, RLS/entitlements/quota RPCs. Decision rule: 'touches DB schema, money, auth, or service worker? → gated.' Migration rollback-block convention: every `supabase/migrations/*.sql` dated ≥ 2026-05-12 MUST carry a tested `-- ROLLBACK:` block (pre-cutoff files grandfathered → PITR; we don't retrofit fabricated reversal SQL). CLAUDE.md Branching Strategy section rewritten (old 3-trigger 'add a stage branch when' stance retired — 2 of 3 fired). SHIP_CHECKLIST.md gains Phase 0.5 risk-tier gate. New .github/pull_request_template.md auto-populates the gated-lane checklist on every PR. Branch protection verified correct (UAT+Playwright strict status check, force-push blocked, enforce_admins:false INTENTIONAL — keeps fast lane fast; gated-lane enforcement is process+template+UAT-guard not branch-protection since path-scoped PR-required is impractical solo). Rollback runbook (frontend Vercel 1-click · migration-in-preview close-PR · migration-in-prod ROLLBACK-block or PITR · Stripe event replay · SW cache-bump). Founder dashboard setup checklist (Supabase Pro $25/mo + PITR + GH integration + branching · Vercel Supabase integration per-env credentials · Stripe test/live key scoping) — do BEFORE Stripe weekend so the highest-stakes migration ever (payments) debuts on a branch DB not prod. 6 UAT guards (migration-rollback date-cutoff + 5 doc-presence/tombstone). This ship is itself fast-lane (docs+test+template, no DB/money/auth/SW) — trunk-based direct-to-main, consistent with the policy it codifies. |
| v4.99.58 | Phase 3 Cycle 6 — Security+ Change Management. 10 exemplars across 4 clusters covering all 11 sub-concepts from founder's morning Messer session: change management process, change approval flow, CAB (Change Advisory Board), RFC form, ownership, stakeholders, impact analysis + risk, testing/sandboxing, backout/rollback plan, maintenance window, SOPs. Cluster A (3 exemplars · Governance & Roles): CAB composition cross-functional vs technical-only, Ownership-vs-Stakeholders RACI distinction, full approval-process flow ordering. Cluster B (2 exemplars · Documentation Discipline): RFC mandatory fields (multi-select), SOP definition vs RFC distinction. Cluster C (3 exemplars · Pre-implementation Discipline): impact analysis scope/risk/dependencies, sandbox/staging testing pre-prod, backout plan as non-negotiable approval gate. Cluster D (2 exemplars · Operational scheduling + synthesis): maintenance window purpose, complete-change-record audit (multi-select with PIR). Plus 3 retention concepts (Change Management Workflow · Ownership vs Stakeholders vs CAB · Backout Plan as Approval Gate) injected into every Sec+ generation prompt as a soft tiebreaker. Sec+ exemplar bank: 121 → 131 (77 carry-over + 54 phase 3). All original content from public SY0-701 blueprint; zero paid-bank ingestion. |
| v4.99.57 | Landing Baseline Diagnostic D.6 — Download path wired end-to-end. The Download CTA on the D.4 results page now opens a 3-action dialog: (1) Print or save as PDF (calls window.print() against a new @media print stylesheet that hides interactive chrome + unrolls the answer review for paper), (2) Email me the report (inline form → POST /api/diagnostic/email-report → Resend with HTML+plain-text template that includes score ring, pass verdict, weak-domain spotlight, and a shareable /r/{token} link), (3) Copy a shareable link (POST /api/diagnostic/share → returns /r/<32-hex> public URL with copy-to-clipboard wiring). New supabase/migrations/20260511_diagnostic_share.sql: diagnostic_share table (token PK · jsonb results · view_count + last_viewed_at telemetry · 90-day expiry) with public anon SELECT (token IS the access gate — no PII in row, just cert + results + counters), diagnostic_email_rate_limit table (10 calls/hour/IP-hash · shared by share + email-report endpoints · separate from D.3 quiz + D.5 signup counters), 3 RPCs (diag_email_check_and_increment, increment_share_view granted to anon for view counter, diag_share_purge_old cleanup). 4 new Vercel edge endpoints in landing/api/diagnostic/: share.js (POST · validate + rate-limit + service-role write · returns shareUrl), share-fetch.js (GET · anon-key read with hex-validated token · fires fire-and-forget view-count bump · returns JSON for results.html hydration), share-redirect.js (target of /r/:token Vercel rewrite · looks up cert · whitelists value · 302s to /diagnostic/{cert}/results?token=… · soft-error redirects on invalid/expired/missing token), email-report.js (POST · validates email + cert + results · ensures share token · Resend HTML+text email · uses NOTIFY_FROM_EMAIL same as notify.js · graceful 503 on missing env vars). landing/vercel.json: new rewrite { source: '/r/:token', destination: '/api/diagnostic/share-redirect?token=:token' }. results.html major refactor: new ?token=<hex> URL handle that fetches from /api/diagnostic/share-fetch (used by /r/<token> share-redirect target) and renders the page · render code extracted to renderResultsContent() function · new renderShareError() for expired/not-found/network states · cachedShareToken reused across Email + Share button clicks so the same /r/{token} URL is shared everywhere · print footer pinned to the bottom with permalink/date. End-to-end smoke-tested via Chrome MCP at localhost:3131 (rich render still works 5/5 sections + 660 score + Pass Plan; Download CTA opens stub; all 3 actions present; Email form reveal on click; ?token=… URL on invalid token shows correct share-error rendering with "Take the diagnostic" CTA). 48 UAT regression guards (10 migration · 14 endpoint-level checks across share/share-fetch/share-redirect/email-report · 1 vercel rewrite · 12 results-html wiring · 1 print-CSS · plus 3 a11y/copy/cachedShareToken/clipboard). NEXT (post-push): apply supabase/migrations/20260511_diagnostic_share.sql via Supabase Dashboard SQL Editor; confirm RESEND_API_KEY + NOTIFY_FROM_EMAIL env vars are present on the landing Vercel project (same vars notify.js needs · likely already set); redeploy. Endpoints all 503 gracefully without env vars so deploy never breaks. |
| v4.99.56 | Landing Baseline Diagnostic D.5 — anonymous → authed magic-link migration. End-to-end account claim flow: landing /diagnostic/results Continue CTA now opens a working email form; on submit, POSTs to new /api/diagnostic/signup-magic-link Vercel edge endpoint (validates email + cert + results shape · separate 5-call-per-hour-per-IP-hash rate limit via diag_signup_check_and_increment RPC distinct from D.3's 25-call-per-24h quiz quota · SHA-256-truncated IP hash, salted, never stores raw · crypto-random 32-hex token via WebCrypto · writes diagnostic_pending row via service-role bypassing RLS · gracefully 503s pre-config). Client then calls supabase.auth.signInWithOtp({ emailRedirectTo: '<cert-app>/?action=claim-diagnostic&token=...' }) — Supabase auto-sends magic link from its configured email provider. New supabase/migrations/20260511_diagnostic_pending.sql: diagnostic_pending table (token PK, jsonb results, 7-day expiry) + claim_diagnostic_results(p_token) SECURITY DEFINER RPC granted to authenticated role, handles all 4 outcomes (claimed / already_claimed / expired / not_found), merges into profiles.metadata.diagnostic (latest) + profiles.metadata.diagnostic_history[] (log) on success, one-shot via claimed_at timestamp. New root-level diagnostic-claim.js script (~190 LOC, precached in SW SHELL_ASSETS, loaded after auth-state.js): self-contained URL hook that detects ?action=claim-diagnostic&token= combo, waits for SIGNED_IN via onAuthStateChange, calls RPC, toasts result, re-hydrates cloud-store on success, strips URL params, idempotent via sessionStorage attempted-tokens log. End-to-end smoke-tested via Chrome MCP at localhost:3131 (Continue stub form renders, invalid-email inline error, valid submit shows Sending… then graceful "network error" fallback against http.server). 42 UAT regression guards (13 migration · 13 endpoint · 6 stub-form · 7 claim-hook · 2 wiring · 1 backward-compat). NEXT (post-push): apply supabase/migrations/20260511_diagnostic_pending.sql via Supabase Dashboard SQL Editor; add SUPABASE_URL / SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY env vars to the landing Vercel project (if not present already); redeploy. Endpoint gracefully 503s without env vars so deploy never breaks — config can land at any point. |
| v4.99.55 | Landing Baseline Diagnostic D.4 — rich results page replacing the D.2 placeholder. landing/diagnostic/network-plus/results.html rewritten: animated score ring SVG with score-band colour (foundation/near-pass/on-pace/ready) + pass-threshold tick at 720; full Pass Plan section (score-band classifier → label/headline/tone + 3 concrete next-step actions keyed to weak domains + intake.examDate + intake.intensity); by-domain breakdown weakest-first with progress bars + drill targets per domain; collapsible question-by-question review surfacing per-Q confidence (Locked in / Pretty sure / Guessing); 5-path CTA fan-out in priority order: (1) Subscribe to Pro [primary, Path A], (2) Continue with free account [secondary, Path B · magic-link], (3) Download/email score report [tertiary, Path C], (4) Retake [ghost, Path D · clears session + results with confirm prompt], (5) Back to landing [ghost, Path E]. Pre-Stripe / pre-D.5 / pre-D.6 placeholders: Subscribe / Continue / Download CTAs open inline stub panels referencing the next ship that lands each path (D.6.5 / D.5 / D.6) instead of erroring. Empty state preserved + backward-compat for D.2 sessionStorage test. Reduced-motion gate. End-to-end smoke-tested via Chrome MCP at localhost:3131 (sessionStorage fixture injection · ring/tick rotation/CTA click + stub open-close + retake confirm + review toggle all verified). 33 UAT regression guards (2 tombstones · 7 ring/band · 6 Pass Plan · 5 CTAs · 4 stubs · 4 review · 2 empty-state · 2 a11y · 1 source-eyebrow). |
| v4.99.54 | Landing Baseline Diagnostic D.3 — AI generation endpoint + Turnstile bot protection + per-IP rate limit (25 calls/24h). New /api/diagnostic/generate Vercel edge function (Anthropic Claude Haiku 4.5 + Cloudflare Turnstile siteverify + Supabase atomic check-and-increment RPC). New supabase/migrations/20260511_diagnostic_rate_limit.sql adds diagnostic_rate_limit table + diag_rl_check_and_increment(ip_hash,cert,increment) SECURITY DEFINER RPC + diag_rl_purge_old cleanup helper + admin-only RLS. Endpoint gracefully degrades to 503 if any env var missing (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY / TURNSTILE_SECRET_KEY / SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY) — pre-config deploys never break. Quiz page now AI-first with inline-pool fallback: invisible Turnstile widget fires callback, AI-fetch with 25s AbortController timeout, falls back to shuffled inline pool on any error path (10s Turnstile timeout, 4xx/5xx, network, malformed response). Session envelope refactored to carry the full questions array (not just IDs) so AI + inline sources are interchangeable. Source banner displays only when fallback fires (silent on AI success or pre-config 'inline'). Timer + Wake Lock now start in showLive() (after session is populated) instead of module load. tickTimer guards against null session. 35 UAT regression guards (8 migration · 14 endpoint · 13 quiz integration). |
| v4.99.53 | Landing Baseline Diagnostic D.2 — real 20-question quiz UI replaces the D.1 placeholder. Self-contained inline question pool (20 questions weighted to CompTIA N10-009 blueprint: 5 Networking Concepts / 4 Implementation / 4 Operations / 3 Security / 4 Troubleshooting). Per-question UI: domain pill + difficulty pill + objective meta + 4 MCQ options + 3-tier confidence picker (Guessing / Pretty sure / Locked in). 30-min countdown timer (informational only, no hard cutoff). Wake Lock during quiz + Visibility API pause-on-blur (mirrors Phase 10 v4.99.49 exam-mode pattern). Quit button with confirm. Question order shuffles on each session start (Fisher-Yates). sessionStorage state envelope persists in-progress quiz so reload resumes; full results envelope written to sessionStorage on finish + localStorage snapshot for landing-page resume CTA. Score scaled CompTIA-style 100-900 (linear: 100 + (correct/20)*800; pass = 720). Domain breakdown sorted weakest-first. ARIA radiogroup semantics + reduced-motion gate + no-JS fallback. New /results placeholder page reads sessionStorage envelope and renders score + weak-domain list + D.4-next-ship banner. End-to-end smoke-tested via Playwright/Chrome MCP. 30 UAT regression guards (quiz: 23, results: 5, plus 2 tombstones). |

D.3 builds the AI generation endpoint with Turnstile + anonymous quota. |

| v4.99.49 | MOBILE_OPTIMIZATION_PLAN Phase 10 — day-to-day mobile usability. Four small but cumulative wins: (1) Screen Wake Lock during 90-min exam mode keeps phone awake (was sleeping at 30s on iOS, 60-120s on Android) — _acquireExamWakeLock on startExamTimer + _releaseExamWakeLock on submitExam/timeout. (2) Visibility API pauses exam timer on tab hide and extends examEndTime by hidden duration on resume — student doesn't lose seconds to notification interrupts. (3) Online/offline connectivity banner via window 'offline'/'online' events — sticky top, slides in, auto-hides 3s after reconnect. Initial cold-start check via navigator.onLine. (4) inputmode hints: 'numeric' on settings daily-goal input, 'decimal' on Subnet Trainer answer + gate-quiz inputs (IP-friendly numpad with .). All gracefully no-op on browsers without API support. 16 UAT regression guards. |

Includes Web Share API for direct send-link-to-desktop + clipboard.writeText fallback for browsers without share API. Reusable _isDesktopOnlyViewport (gate at innerWidth < 900) + _showDesktopOnlyNudge(featureName, featureDescription) helpers. role=dialog + aria-modal=true + focus trap on primary button. Reduced-motion gate for transitions. 11 UAT regression guards. Closes the loop from Phase 7 audit (iPad portrait TB rendered the actual UI which felt cramped — now it shows an intentional 'use desktop' message instead). |

On mobile, the invisible toast + subtle goSettings transition = 'tap did nothing' UX. All 4 sites now route through validateApiKey() which bypasses the BYOK check for signed-in users (the server proxy at /api/ai/generate handles their requests via Supabase JWT).
