Responsive <680px stacks header. **Zero engine changes**. **Live-verified via Chrome MCP**: sidebar streak dark-gradient card rendering at bottom-left with flame + "13" + "DAY STREAK" ✓; 5 domain cells with 5 canonical topics each (25 total) \u2014 weak topics matching `computeWeakSpotScores` data (Concepts 2 weak, Implementation 5 weak, Operations 0 weak, Security 3 weak, Troubleshooting 3 weak) ✓; Settings shows Daily Goal section with input "20" + 20-chip active + Save button ✓; Analytics `#history-panel` has `is-hidden` class ✓; heatmap renders 370 SVG cells + 4 stats (13/18/25/25) + red exam-day marker ✓. **UAT**: **25 new v4.54.10 assertions** (CSS 10 / JS 13 / HTML 2). Updated 3 legacy (APP_VERSION + SW to 4.54.10, v4.54.1 renderHistoryPanel assertion \u2192 regression guard, v4.54.8 dg-weak-chips \u2192 dg-topic-list + CANONICAL_DOMAIN_TOPICS). Widened 1 regex span (v4.53.0 domain-grid drillDomain 3000 \u2192 6000). Updated 1 Playwright test (history-panel visibility \u2192 function-call content check). Total UAT: 3352 \u2192 **3377** passing. Playwright: **64/64** green locally. Validation-audit regression gate still green. Cache: `netplus-v4.54.10`. ~800 LOC across `app.js` + `styles.css` + `index.html` + `tests/uat.js` + `tests/e2e/app.spec.js`. **16th ship in ~36 hours**. Closes the prototype mapping story + adds the highest-value new Analytics card (heatmap) that wasn't in the prototype at all. Monday cadence = v4.55.0 ACL Fix-This. |
| v4.54.9 | **Editorial sweep on remaining pages + global zoom-in + drop sidebar count pills** \u2014 user: *"comb the app and use the prototype to redesign the remaining parts... zoom in the whole app a bit more (I wear glasses, my vision is absolutely not the best in the land)... finally remove [the drill count] numbers, simply not relevant"*. Three asks in one ship. **(1) Reusable `.ed-pagehead` component** replaces the legacy `<div style="display:flex">{Back} <h2>{Title}</h2></div>` block with: back button + monospace small-caps eyebrow (leading-dash `\u2014` pseudo) + italic-accent display heading + optional lede + `border-bottom: 2px solid var(--border)` with `::after` 80px accent strip. Applied to **Progress** ("Coverage \u00b7 50 topics" / "Topic <em>progress.</em>"), **Review** ("Review \u00b7 session answers" / "Every <em>answer.</em>"), **Settings** ("Account \u00b7 configuration" / "Your <em>settings.</em>"), **Drills Launcher** ("Muscle memory \u00b7 fast feedback" / "Interactive <em>drills.</em>" + lede). Light-theme overrides flip to `#6355e0` brand purple. Responsive <680px shrinks display to 30px. **(2) Exam page editorial parity with Quiz** \u2014 added `#exam-prog-dots` segmented per-question progress dots below the exam progress bar, rendered by new `_renderExamProgressDots()` hooked into `renderExam()`. Reads `examAnswers[i]` for per-question state: `qpd-now` (current), `qpd-flagged` (yellow, for flagged-unanswered), `qpd-done` (answered), pending (grey). Replaced the legacy `.kb-hint` in `.exam-nav-row` with the editorial `.quiz-kbd-hints` footer (monospace bordered kbd pills \u2014 "A B C D pick / \u2190\u2192 navigate / F flag"). Added hidden `#exam-wrong-explain` block inside `.q-card`. **(3) Exam Results v2 editorial parallel** \u2014 retired the old `.exam-results-hero` card-style (now `display: none !important`). New `.exam-results-v2` block mirrors Quiz Results v2: dark linear-gradient hero (`160deg, #16131f, #0d0a15`) + radial accent overlay, **84px tabular-nums scaled score**, monospace small-caps label, pass/fail verdict pill + hardcore badge, dashed-divider side aside with 4 monospace stat rows. Editorial eyebrow "Exam \u00b7 90 questions \u00b7 complete" + 50px italic-accent display heading. `submitExam` writes `Pass mark <em>cleared.</em>` or `More <em>work needed.</em>` to `#exam-result-headline` based on pass/fail. Responsive <680px collapses hero to single-col. **(4) Session Transition + Session Complete editorial hero** \u2014 new `.session-hero-v2` class with centered 56px emoji + monospace eyebrow + 42px italic-accent display heading. Transition: "Session \u00b7 progress" / "Topic 1 <em>done.</em>". Complete: "Session \u00b7 complete" / "All topics <em>cleared.</em>". **(5) Drills Launcher tiles polished** \u2014 `.drills-tile` now has 14px radius + hover lift + colored shadow + `::after` 3px scaleX hover accent bar that color-cycles per `:nth-child` (accent / green / blue / yellow). Tile titles 18px weight-700, subs monospace 12px. Reduced-motion neutralises. **(6) Global 6% zoom-in** \u2014 added `html { zoom: 1.06 }` per user's vision/readability ask. Works on Chrome/Safari/Edge (Firefox supports zoom on Gecko v126+). Scales everything uniformly including the sidebar \u2014 no layout breakage because all positioning is relative/percentage-based. Verified `getComputedStyle(html).zoom === "1.06"` in browser. **(7) Retired sidebar drill count pills** \u2014 `renderAppSidebar` no longer computes `drillCounts` (the `_probeSize` helper + consts probes removed); the `.sb-item-count` CSS rule is hard-hidden via `display: none !important` as a regression tombstone. Subnet Mastery 6 / Port Drill 27 / Acronym Blitz 110 / OSI Sorter 50 / Cable ID 28 badges all gone. **Zero engine changes** \u2014 all drill flows, `renderProgressPage`, `showReview`, `submitExam` inner logic, `tbOpen*`, `aclOpen*`, etc. untouched. **Live-verified via Chrome MCP** (local dev, SW cleared): `html` zoom resolved to 1.06 ✓; `document.querySelectorAll('.sb-item-count').length === 0` ✓; Progress page shows "COVERAGE \u00b7 50 TOPICS" eyebrow + "Topic progress." italic-accent display ✓; Settings page shows "ACCOUNT \u00b7 CONFIGURATION" + "Your settings." + 3 monospace-labelled section cards ✓; Drills launcher shows "MUSCLE MEMORY \u00b7 FAST FEEDBACK" + "Interactive drills." + "Four drills for the rote parts of Network+. Pick one." lede + 4 drill tiles with per-tile color accents ✓. Screenshots captured for all 3 pages. **UAT**: **23 new v4.54.9 assertions** \u2014 CSS (13: .ed-pagehead + 80px strip + italic-accent em + monospace eyebrow + leading-dash pseudo, qpd-flagged yellow, .drills-tile hover accent bar + per-index color cycling, .exam-results-v2-hero dark gradient + 84px tabular-nums, .session-hero-eyebrow monospace, html { zoom: 1.06 }, reduced-motion neutralisation, .sb-item-count hidden, .exam-results-hero retired); HTML (8: Review/Progress/Settings/Drills editorial headers + italic-accent display titles, exam-prog-dots + quiz-kbd-hints on exam page, exam-wrong-explain block, exam-results-v2 display + hero + side, session-hero-v2 + display on both transition + complete); JS (4: _renderExamProgressDots defined + called from renderExam + qpd-flagged state, submitExam writes editorial headline, renderAppSidebar no longer computes drillCounts regression guard). Updated 3 legacy assertions (Settings h2 \u2192 ed-pagehead-display, progress-header wrapper + progress-title class \u2192 ed-pagehead, v4.54.8 drillCounts assertion \u2192 regression guard). Updated 2 version strings (4.54.8 \u2192 4.54.9). Updated 1 Playwright test (exam page kb-hint locator \u2192 .quiz-kbd-hints). Total UAT: 3329 \u2192 **3352** passing. Playwright: **64/64** green locally. Validation-audit regression gate still green. Cache: `netplus-v4.54.9`. ~500 LOC across `app.js` + `styles.css` + `index.html` + `tests/uat.js` + `tests/e2e/app.spec.js`. **15th ship in ~34 hours**. Every major page surface in the app now carries the editorial aesthetic; the entire app is zoomed 6% larger for vision comfort. Monday cadence = v4.55.0 ACL Fix-This. |
| v4.54.8 | **Editorial prototype completion mega-ship** \u2014 user: *"lets do ideas 1,2,3,4 as well as the Minor Polish you are asking. do all these NOW"*. Closes the prototype-mapping backlog in one coherent release \u2014 5 feature bundles, ~800 LOC, ~6 hrs of focused work. **(A) Sidebar drill nav-count pills** \u2014 `renderAppSidebar` now probes top-level consts (`ST_CATEGORIES`, `GT_PORTS`, `AB_DATA`, `OS_DATA`, `CB_CABLES`+`CB_CONNECTORS`) via a `_probeSize` helper (typeof-guarded to avoid ReferenceError, since top-level `const` is NOT attached to window in script context) and emits a monospace `.sb-item-count` chip per drill entry showing bank size \u2014 Subnet Mastery 6, Port Drill 27, Acronym Blitz 110, OSI Sorter 50, Cable ID 28. Active-state styling: accent-tinted bg + full opacity. **(B) Results elapsed-time + inline review list + Drill-mistakes CTA** \u2014 new 5th `.results-v2-row` shows session duration (`_sessionStartTs` captured in `startQuiz` + `drillMistakesFromResults`, formatted via `_formatElapsed(ms)` \u2014 "2m 34s" / "47s"). New `.results-v2-review` section below `#diff-breakdown`: editorial eyebrow "Review \u00b7 this session", 28px italic-accent title "Every <em>answer.</em>", 80px accent strip above, and a bordered list where each row is `N\u00b0 NN | truncated prompt + topic/domain | verdict badge` \u2014 tappable to jump to the full Review page at that index (`showReview(false, i)`). New `Drill my N mistakes` CTA appears in the cta-row (hidden when 0 wrong); `drillMistakesFromResults()` builds a fresh quiz from THIS session's wrong log entries (not the global wrong-bank). Verdict badges: moss-green "Correct" + red-tinted "Wrong" pills, monospace small-caps. **(C) Home polish pass (5 items)** \u2014 **(C1) \u00a7 section accent strip**: `.ed-section-head` now has `border-bottom: 2px solid var(--border)` + `::after` 80px accent strip at `bottom: -2px` (prototype's signature rhythm). **(C2) Quick Start card colour-cycling**: each `.preset-tile` gets an `::after` 3px bottom bar that scales from `scaleX(0)` to `scaleX(1)` on hover, cubic-bezier 280ms. 5-domain palette via `:nth-child` (purple/green/yellow/red). **(C3) Marathon SIM badge**: the 60Q tile adds `preset-sim` class + absolute-positioned `.preset-sim-badge` \u2014 yellow monospace "SIM" pill top-right, mirrors the 90Q full exam sim. **(C4) Weak-topic chips inside domain cells**: `renderSetupDomainGrid` now reads `computeWeakSpotScores()` + `TOPIC_DOMAINS` to surface up to 3 weak topics per domain as outlined accent chips (`.dg-weak-chips > .dg-weak-chip`) below the cell's main stats. Truncated at 18 chars with \u2026 for long topic names. **(C5) Customizer dark prose-summary CTA bar**: new `.cq-summary-bar` renders above the Generate button with dark `linear-gradient(135deg, #16131f, #0d0a15)` background, Georgia-serif prose that reads back the user's choice ("10 exam-level questions \u00b7 <em>AI-picked weak spots</em> \u00b7 est. ~10 min"), and an inline gradient CTA button. Live-updated via `updateCqSummaryBar()` hooked into both `initChips` click handlers + `syncChipAriaPressed` for programmatic toggles. Yellow `<strong>` count, italic-accent `<em>` topic. **(D) Analytics accuracy-over-time chart + stats-strip sparklines** \u2014 **(D1) Sparklines**: new `_sparkPath(values, w, h)` + `_weeklyStatSeries(h, 12)` helpers compute 12-week buckets for sessions / questions / accuracy / study-days. The existing 4-cell hero stats strip now renders a thin accent/green/orange SVG sparkline (160x22) below each number at 0.7 opacity, full opacity on hover \u2014 the "at a glance trend" the Analytics page was missing. **(D2) Accuracy chart**: new `_renderAnaAccuracyChart(h)` + `_anaAccChartTab(range)` functions build a 960x220 SVG with **dashed gridlines at 60/70/80/90**, **2px dashed accent pass-mark line at 72%** (with monospace "PASS" label), area-fill under curve (7% opacity), 2px accent line with circle dots per data point, and **Week/Month/All tabs** (Month active by default). All 3 ranges rendered as separate SVG `<g>` groups; tab click shows/hides via `display`. Chart card has editorial eyebrow "\u2014 Accuracy \u00b7 over time" + 22px italic-accent title "Are you trending <em>toward pass?</em>". Inserted into `renderAnalytics()` right after the Readiness hero \u2014 biggest missing "am I on track?" visual. **(E) Quiz editorial overhaul** \u2014 **(E1) Segmented progress dots**: new `.quiz-prog-dots` container below the progress-bar with one pill per question. `_renderQuizProgressDots()` (called from `render()`) walks `questions` + `log` + `current` to emit `qpd-done` (4\u21926px green) / `qpd-wrong` (4\u21926px red) / `qpd-now` (8px accent w/ glow ring) / pending (4px grey). **(E2) Editorial kbd-hints footer**: new `.quiz-kbd-hints` replaces the old `.kb-hint` (force-hidden via `#page-quiz .kb-hint { display: none }`). Three groups: `<kbd>A</kbd><kbd>B</kbd><kbd>C</kbd><kbd>D</kbd> pick` / `<kbd>\u23ce</kbd> submit / next` / `<kbd>F</kbd> flag`. Monospace bordered pill style with 2px bottom-border for tactile "key" look. **(E3) Wrong-explain pullquote**: new `#exp-wrong-explain` block inside the existing `.explanation-box`. `showExplanation` reads `q.wrongExplain[chosen]` (defensive \u2014 falls back to hidden if the question doesn't carry the map), renders as italic muted paragraph with 3px left-border accent ("On your choice (C): \u2026"). Questions without wrongExplain get the normal explanation only. **(F) Prototype polish inheritance** \u2014 all new surfaces carry light-theme overrides to `#6355e0` brand purple variant, reduced-motion guards that neutralise the 5 new transitions (quick-card::after scaleX, cq-summary-cta lift, review-row padding slide, qpd-cell sizing, acc-chart tab). Narrow-viewport (<560px) stacks the .cq-summary-bar. **Zero engine changes** \u2014 `pick()`, `startQuiz()`, `finish()`, `render()`, all PBQ renderers, Exam mode, Topology Builder, ACL Builder untouched. **Live-verified via Chrome MCP** (local dev, SW cleared): sidebar renders 5 count pills (Subnet 6, Ports 27, Acronyms 110, OSI 50, Cables 28) \u2713; home shows \u00a7 section accent strips, MARATHON MODE with SIM badge on 60Q tile \u2713, BY DOMAIN grid with per-domain weak-topic chips (Concepts: TCP/IP Basics + Subnetting; Implementation: BGP+STP/RSTP+OSPF; Security: PKI+Network Attacks+Securing TCP/IP; Troubleshooting: Cable Issues+Connection Issues+CompTIA Troubleshooting) \u2713; Custom Quiz details expanded \u2014 cq-summary-bar dark gradient + "10 exam-level questions \u00b7 Mixed across all topics \u00b7 est. ~10 min" prose + ⚡ Generate Quiz \u2192 CTA \u2713; Analytics shows 4 sparklines in stats strip + new accuracy chart with italic-accent title + dashed PASS line at 72% + WEEK/MONTH/ALL tabs with Month active \u2713; Quiz page renders `#quiz-prog-dots`, `.quiz-kbd-hints`, `#exp-wrong-explain` \u2713. **UAT**: **34 new v4.54.8 assertions** \u2014 HTML (8), JS (12), CSS (14). Updated 3 legacy assertions (APP_VERSION + SW cache to 4.54.8, v4.50.0 Generate-button moved inside .cq-summary-bar). Updated 1 Playwright test (quiz kbd-hint locator `.kb-hint` \u2192 `.quiz-kbd-hints`, expected text "pick" instead of "Enter"). Total UAT: 3292 \u2192 **3329** passing. Playwright: **64/64** green locally. Validation-audit regression gate still green. Cache: `netplus-v4.54.8`. ~800 LOC across `app.js` + `styles.css` + `index.html` + `tests/uat.js` + `tests/e2e/app.spec.js`. **14th ship in ~33 hours**. Closes the prototype-mapping story \u2014 editorial aesthetic now fully ported across Home / Analytics / Results / Quiz / TB / Sidebar. Monday cadence = v4.55.0 ACL Fix-This. |
| v4.54.7 | **Topology Builder full-bleed layout + draggable config panel** \u2014 user reviewed v4.54.6 with 5 annotated screenshots: *"i thought you were going to make it stretch to almost the whole page or at least up till the side navigation bar / when you open a device and it says 'show full config' it should then show this same panel in the screen shot as a translucent/transparent panel that can be moved around also / This part needs to be collapsible [legacy toolbar] / the devices are kinda squashed, stretch it out a bit horizontally / you see that the whole thing has been stretched all the way to side navigation panel for the app... thats what i wanted it needs to cover like a full page basically"*. All 5 addressed. **(1) Full-bleed TB page** \u2014 `#page-topology-builder.page` overrides the default `.page { max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 24px 20px }` to `max-width: none; padding: 0 16px; margin-left: 0; margin-right: 0`. The workspace now fills the entire area from the app sidebar to the viewport right edge. Pre-v4.54.7 the old `#page-topology-builder { max-width: 1500px }` capped canvas at ~1500px even on 1920px monitors, leaving huge dead-space; now it expands edge-to-edge. **(2) Widened 3-col grid** \u2014 `.tb-workspace-v3` changed from `220px 1fr 260px` to `220px minmax(0, 1fr) 260px` so the middle column actually takes all remaining space (the `minmax(0, ...)` prevents auto-min-content sizing from limiting the canvas). Canvas height now `calc(100vh - 240px)` so it fills almost the full viewport vertically \u2014 matches the prototype in image 5. **(3) Device spread** \u2014 `TB_VIEW_DEFAULT` widened from `{x:350,y:250,w:1100,h:600}` \u2192 `{x:250,y:200,w:1300,h:780}` so the viewBox window sees more of the 1800x1100 world. Scenarios that auto-build devices at ~200-1600 world coords (home-network, small-office, etc.) now have room on the viewport instead of bunching into the middle. `TB_VIEW_MIN_W` 250\u2192300 + `TB_VIEW_MAX_W` 2400\u21922600 so the zoom clamp still makes sense with the wider default. **(4) Floating draggable full-config panel** \u2014 `#tb-config-panel` was a slide-out 4th grid column; now it's `position: fixed; top: 90px; right: 28px; z-index: 20; width: 440px` with the same transparent dark-glass aesthetic as the v4.54.6 inspector popup: `background: rgba(13,10,21,.88)` + `backdrop-filter: blur(16px)` + 14px corner radius + layered shadow + `tbConfigPopIn` overshoot entrance animation. Header is the drag handle (`cursor: grab`, linear accent gradient bg). `tbBindConfigPanelDrag()` binds once at TB open and runs position:fixed viewport-relative math. Close and Explain buttons skip the drag (click-through via `e.target.closest('.tb-config-close')` + `.tb-explain-btn` short-circuit). `tbOpenConfigPanel()` resets inline `left/top/right` on every open so opening a second device after dragging the first doesn't leave the popup off-screen. The old CSS rule that reshaped the grid to `200px 1fr 360px` when `.tb-config-open` is active is neutralised back to the normal 3-col grid (no 4th column). **(5) Collapsible legacy toolbar** \u2014 the big `.tb-toolbar-v2` (Actions / Simulate / Practice / File / Scenario dropdown / Utility \u2014 36 buttons) is now wrapped in `<details id="tb-toolbar-details">` default-closed with a `FULL TOOLBAR` monospace summary + rotating chevron + hint text listing what's inside ("AI Generate \u00b7 File \u00b7 Scenario dropdown \u00b7 Utility"). The in-canvas pill bar covers Design/Simulate/Labs/Coach/Grade/PNG; this drawer is the power-user escape hatch. `tbAutoCollapseIntroHowto()` now also pins `tb-toolbar-details` closed on every TB open. **(6) How-to collapsed by default + capped expanded height** \u2014 `tbAutoCollapseIntroHowto` removes `open` from `#tb-howto-details` unconditionally (was conditional on "has any devices"). `.tb-howto-details[open] { max-height: 40vh; overflow-y: auto }` caps the expanded state so even if the user opens it, the 5 step cards don't push the canvas far down. Same `max-height: 32vh` cap on `.tb-scenario-panel` when a scenario's requirements card is expanded. **Light-theme overrides** for all new surfaces: toolbar-details bg + summary text + chevron flip to `#6355e0` brand purple variant; config-panel flips to near-white translucent bg with soft purple border + shadow. **Responsive**: <900px stacks the workspace + re-anchors the config popup to `top: 60px; right: 12px; width: calc(100vw - 24px)` so it doesn't overflow on narrow screens. **Reduced-motion** kills the `tbConfigPopIn` entrance + the chevron rotate transition. **Zero changes** to: canvas engine, `tbRenderCanvas`, simulation, labs, Coach, Grade, AI Generate, Fix Challenges, the 20+ config tabs inside the panel (Overview / Interfaces / Routing / VLANs / DHCP / CLI / OSPF / BGP / EIGRP / QoS / VXLAN / STP / Wireless / DNS / Attack / Security Groups / NACLs / VPC / VPN / SASE), scenario picker, all device handlers / IDs / ARIA. **Live-verified via Chrome MCP** (local dev, SW cleared): `getComputedStyle(#page-topology-builder).maxWidth === "none"` ✓; `tbViewDefault` resolved to `{x:250,y:200,w:1300,h:780}` ✓; `toolbarDetailsOpen = false, howtoOpen = false` ✓; loaded Home Network scenario (7 devices) \u2014 WiFi-AP branches out to Laptop, Phone, Smart-TV, Console with much more horizontal breathing room than v4.54.6; opened Home-Router config panel \u2014 `position: fixed`, top: 90px, right: 28px, z-index: 20, backdrop-filter: blur(16px), border-radius: 14px, head cursor: grab ✓; Overview tab rendered Home-Router + ROUTER badge + 2/2 ports up + ROUTES/ARP/DHCP stats + 2 Connected Interfaces (eth0 192.168.1.1/24 + eth1 169.254.10.1/24 w/ MACs and cable links) + Edit Interfaces / Routing Table / Open CLI buttons \u2014 exact same layout as image 2, now translucent floating popup that can be dragged anywhere. Screenshots captured for both empty + config-open states. **UAT**: **19 new v4.54.7 assertions** \u2014 HTML (2: `#tb-toolbar-details` wrapper + "Full toolbar" summary); JS (5: TB_VIEW_DEFAULT widened, tbBindConfigPanelDrag + close/explain short-circuit, openTopologyBuilder hook, tbOpenConfigPanel resets inline pos, tbAutoCollapseIntroHowto pins both details closed); CSS (12: full-bleed #page-topology-builder max-width:none, minmax(0,1fr) middle column, calc(100vh) canvas min-height, toolbar-details styling + rotating chevron, config-panel position:fixed + backdrop-blur, grab cursor header, tbConfigPopIn keyframe, how-to max-height 40vh, light-theme overrides, reduced-motion neutralisation, responsive <900px config popup). Updated 4 legacy assertions (APP_VERSION + SW cache to 4.54.7, v4.54.6 viewBox literal 350 250 1100 600 \u2192 250 200 1300 780, "Sim toolbar shown on open" span widened 1500\u21922500 since `openTopologyBuilder` grew by ~1000 chars). Total UAT: 3273 \u2192 **3292** passing. Playwright full suite: **64/64** green locally. Validation-audit regression gate still green. Cache: `netplus-v4.54.7`. ~300 LOC across `app.js` + `styles.css` + `index.html`. **13th ship in ~31 hours** \u2014 closes the v4.54.6 review feedback loop. TB v4 story is functionally complete: prototype's 3-col layout + pill toolbar + pan/zoom + draggable inspector + draggable full-config, on our 32-scenario / 4500-LOC working sandbox. |
| v4.54.6 | **Topology Builder usability fixes** \u2014 user reviewed v4.54.5 with 5 screenshots and 6 specific asks: *"i need this tab in there just like the prototype / Topology should cover the whole horizontal area, with mouse-drag pan + zoom features / Inspector has now moved to the bottom which is unfortunate but i know a better workaround where we can have it as a transparent pop-up that i can move around at any time. it pops up when you click on a device. it needs to fit the Branding of the prototype whilst matching our colour scheme / scenarios with subheaders for what type of scenario it is just like you had before, and also i need to be able to see all the words as some are hidden / devices in rows of 2's, more polished / Overall the topology builder needs to be much more zoomed in by default."* All six addressed in one ship. **(1) Pill toolbar inside canvas** (`#tb-canvas-pills`) \u2014 translucent dark glass overlay pinned top-left of canvas with 6 pills: Design (active by default) / Simulate / Labs as mode pills, then Coach / Grade (green tint) / PNG as actions. `tbSelectPill(mode)` toggles `aria-pressed` + `tb-pill-active` class with accent gradient. Action pills delegate directly to existing `tbCoachTopology`/`tbGradeTopology`/`tbExportPNG` so the legacy top toolbar stays available as a fallback (no behaviour removed, only added). **(2) Default zoom-in + viewBox-driven canvas** \u2014 SVG `viewBox` is now dynamic via `tbViewState = {x, y, w, h}`. Default tightened from `0 0 1800 1100` \u2192 `350 250 1100 600` for ~1.6\u00d7 zoom-in on first load (devices much more readable). Grid background `<rect>` carries fixed world dims (`width="1800" height="1100"`) so panning beyond the initial view still shows grid. **(3) Mouse-wheel zoom around cursor** \u2014 `tbBindCanvasPanZoom()` attaches a `wheel` listener that converts client coords to world coords via `getScreenCTM().inverse()` and scales viewBox around the anchor (factor 0.9 zoom-in / 1.1 zoom-out per tick). Clamped to `TB_VIEW_MIN_W = 250` (max zoom-in) and `TB_VIEW_MAX_W = 2400` (max zoom-out). +/- and "fit" buttons in `#tb-zoom-ctrls` bottom-right of canvas as backup. **(4) Drag-to-pan** \u2014 `mousedown` on the SVG background (`tagName === 'rect'` or `'svg'`) starts pan; `mousemove` on window updates `tbViewState.x/y`. Devices have own mousedown with `stopPropagation` so device drag is unaffected. Pan and click-to-deselect coexist (no movement \u2192 existing click handler still fires). Cursor flips to grabbing while panning. **(5) Floating draggable inspector popup** (`#tb-inspector-pop`) \u2014 moved Inspector OUT of the right pane and into a `position: absolute` popup INSIDE `.tb-canvas-wrap` so it's bound to the canvas, not the page. Translucent dark glass aesthetic (`rgba(13,10,21,.82)` + `backdrop-filter: blur(14px)`) so canvas shows through; matches prototype branding while staying on our purple accent palette. Header with monospace small-caps "INSPECTOR" title + `\u00d7` close button is the drag handle (cursor: grab). Body scrolls; popup auto-shows on device single-click via `tbInspectorPopOpen()` called from `tbSelectDeviceForInspector()`; auto-closes on scenario-load via `tbInspectorPopClose()` in `tbLoadScenarioWithBuild()`. Drag bound once at TB open via `tbBindInspectorPopDrag()`. Entrance animation `tbInspectorPopIn` (.25s overshoot cubic-bezier). Reduced-motion gated. **(6) Categorized scenarios** with subheaders \u2014 `tbRenderV3ScenariosList()` rewritten to group by `TB_SCENARIO_CATEGORIES`. Free Build pinned first under a "Sandbox" group (with `\u{1F3AF}` icon); then 6 real categories (Campus & Enterprise / WAN Architectures / Broadband & Last-Mile / Advanced WAN / Cloud Networking / Other Network Types) each with a monospace small-caps subheader (matching the editorial language used elsewhere in the app) + count badge. Free Build id is `'free'` (not `'free-build'` \u2014 that's the ACL builder); both ids accepted defensively. Defensive "More" fallback for any scenario not covered by categories. **(7) Scenario text wraps** \u2014 `.tb-v3-scn-cat-body .tb-v3-scn-title` overrides the v4.54.5 truncation: `white-space: normal; overflow: visible; text-overflow: unset` so multi-line titles like "Enterprise w/ IDS + Load Balancer" and "Point-to-Point (Leased Line)" wrap cleanly to 2 lines. Scenario tile `align-items: flex-start` for clean wrap. **(8) 2-col palette grid** \u2014 `.tb-palette.tb-palette-v3 #tb-palette-items` becomes `grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr` with the `.tb-palette-group-head` spanning both columns (`grid-column: 1 / -1`). Tiles flip to vertical layout (icon centered + label below) for the card aesthetic. Min-height 70px, 9px corner radius, `translateY(-1px)` hover lift. **Light-theme overrides** for all new surfaces: pill toolbar, zoom controls, inspector popup, scenario subheaders all flip to `#6355e0` brand purple variant + lavender backgrounds. **Responsive**: <760px stacks pills + shrinks popup to 240px. **Reduced-motion** kills popup entrance animation + pill/zoom transitions. **Zero changes** to: canvas engine, `tbRenderCanvas`, `tbAutoLayout`, `tbProcessCliCommand`, simulation, labs, Coach, Grade, AI Generate, Fix Challenges, modals, scenario picker, all device handlers/IDs/ARIA. **Live-verified via Chrome MCP** (local dev, SW cleared): viewBox resolved to `350 250 1100 600` ✓ default zoom-in ✓; `tbZoomIn` 1100\u2192880 ✓ `tbZoomOut` \u21921375 ✓ `tbZoomReset` \u21921100 ✓; pill state Design\u2192Labs flips `aria-pressed` + `tb-pill-active` ✓; loaded Home Network auto-built 7 devices ✓; clicked Home-Router \u2192 popup opens with hostname + interfaces (eth0 192.168.1.1/255.255.255.0 + eth1 169.254.10.1/255.255.255.0 from v4.49.2 link-local auto-assignment) + "Open full config \u2192" button ✓ entrance animation `tbInspectorPopIn` runs ✓; close button hides popup ✓; scenarios list shows Sandbox + 6 categories with full-text wrapping titles ✓; palette renders 2-col grid (`grid-template-columns: 100.875px 71.525px`). Screenshot confirms full UI. **UAT**: **30 new v4.54.6 assertions** \u2014 HTML (6: pill toolbar #tb-canvas-pills + 3 mode + 3 action pills, zoom controls, inspector popup, viewBox tightened, world-dim grid rect), JS (12: tbViewState + TB_VIEW_DEFAULT, tbZoomIn/Out/Reset/By, tbApplyViewBox, tbBindCanvasPanZoom with wheel + mousedown, MIN/MAX clamp, openTopologyBuilder hooks, tbInspectorPopOpen/Close, tbBindInspectorPopDrag, auto-open on device click, auto-close on scenario load, tbSelectPill aria-toggle, categorised scenarios via TB_SCENARIO_CATEGORIES, Sandbox+free-build), CSS (12: 2-col grid + group-head span, scenario titles wrap, monospace subheader, pill toolbar absolute+blur, active pill gradient, green Grade pill, zoom controls absolute+blur, inspector popup transparent dark glass + radius 14px, grab cursor on header, tbInspectorPopIn keyframe, light-theme overrides, reduced-motion neutralisation). Repurposed 1 v4.54.5 assertion (`.tb-v3-section-sep` removed since Inspector left right pane) + 1 legacy `viewBox` literal assertion (now expects tightened default + world-dim grid rect). Updated 2 version strings (4.54.5 \u2192 4.54.6). Total UAT: 3240 \u2192 **3273** passing. Playwright full suite: **64/64 green** locally. Validation-audit regression gate still green. Cache: `netplus-v4.54.6`. ~750 LOC across `app.js` + `styles.css` + `index.html`. **12th ship in ~30 hours** \u2014 closes the 6-item v4.54.5 review feedback loop in one ship. |
| v4.54.5 | **Topology Builder 3-column layout** \u2014 user clarified *"what i meant was a layout like this"* (screenshot: 3-col palette/canvas/inspector). Zero engine changes. **(1) 3-column grid**: `.tb-workspace-v3` uses `grid-template-columns: 220px 1fr 260px`. **(2) Left pane header inline**: `.tb-v2-header` retired to hidden stub; editorial header now renders as `.tb-pane-head` ("Topology <em>Builder</em>" with 20px weight-800 italic-accent em) + `.tb-pane-sub` at the top of the left palette pane \u2014 matches prototype exactly. **(3) Right pane** (new `#tb-v3-right`): *Scenarios* list (always-visible, all 32) + dashed separator + *Inspector* section (read-only summary of currently-selected device). **(4) `tbRenderV3ScenariosList()`**: Free Build pinned first; each scenario is a pill-row with title + device-count tag. Count computed by running `scen.autoBuild(tmpState)` on a scratch state. Active scenario gets gradient accent bg + bold title + accent tag. Click fires `tbLoadScenarioWithBuild(id)`. **(5) `tbRenderV3Inspector()`**: 4 sections \u2014 Identity (hostname + `TB_DEVICE_TYPES[type].label`), Interfaces (with IP/mask or italic "unassigned"), VLANs (filtered, skips default VLAN 1), Routes (first 3 + "+N more"). "Open full config \u2192" button routes to existing `tbOpenConfigPanel()`. Empty state: "Click a device on the canvas to see its interfaces, IPs, and role summary here." **(6) Device-click hook**: `tbOnDeviceMouseDown` sets `tbSelectedId`; added `tbSelectDeviceForInspector(id)` call so inspector updates on single-click without breaking the existing double-click \u2192 full config flow. **(7) Scenario-load hook**: `tbLoadScenarioWithBuild` clears `tbV3InspectedDeviceId` + re-renders right pane. **(8) Responsive**: <1200px collapses to 2-col (200px + 1fr), right pane hides (modal fallback). **Zero changes** to: canvas engine, simulation, labs, Coach, Grade, AI Generate, Fix Challenges, existing modals/IDs/ARIA/handlers. **Live-verified via Chrome MCP**: grid resolved to `220px 952px 260px`, 32 scenarios with Free Build active, loading Home Network auto-built 7 devices + updated highlight, clicking a device populated inspector with "ISP" hostname + "Internet/WAN" type + Interfaces section + "Open full config \u2192" button. **UAT**: **18 new v4.54.5 assertions** (HTML 4 + JS 10 + CSS 7). Repurposed 5 v4.54.4 assertions (.tb-v2-header \u2192 .tb-pane-head). Updated 2 version strings. **Playwright** full suite: 58/58 green locally. Total UAT: 3219 \u2192 **3240** passing. Cache: `netplus-v4.54.5`. **11th ship in ~28 hours** \u2014 4 Sunday ships (Constellation + Results + TB polish + TB 3-col). ~500 LOC. |
| v4.54.4 | **Topology Builder editorial polish** \u2014 user: *"lets do the Topology page redesign to fit the prototype as best you can"*. The prototype's TB is a simplified static view; ours is a 4500-LOC working sandbox. Editorial chrome polish, zero engine changes. **(1) Retired** the emoji-pill `.tb-hero` via `display: none !important`, kept class in CSS as regression tombstone. **(2) New `.tb-v2-header`** \u2014 matches the editorial language from Home/Analytics/Results: monospace small-caps eyebrow with leading dash accent ("NETWORK DESIGN \u00b7 SANDBOX"), 42px weight-800 italic-accent display heading (*"Topology <em>builder.</em>"*), monospace lede listing real feature counts (29 labs / 31 scenarios / Coach / PNG). **(3) `#tb-v2-stats`** \u2014 new editorial canvas bottom-bar (absolute-positioned, backdrop-blurred, monospace 11.5px) showing live counts: *"N devices \u00b7 N cables \u00b7 N VLANs \u00b7 <scenario>"*. Counts computed from `tbState.devices.length`, `tbState.cables.length`, VLAN aggregator walking `vlanDb` (skips default VLAN 1). Scenario name resolved via `TB_SCENARIOS.find(s => s.id === tbSelectedScenario)`. `tbRenderV2Stats()` hooks into the existing `tbUpdateDeviceCount()` so every device add/remove/scenario-load auto-refreshes. **(4) Toolbar polish**: `.tb-toolbar-v2` gets radial+linear gradient bg; `.tb-tool-group-label` restyled to monospace uppercase 10px small-caps. **(5) Palette headers** (`Devices` / `Cables`) restyled as monospace uppercase 10px with hairline dashed accent separators. **Zero changes** to: canvas engine, `tbRenderCanvas`, `tbAutoLayout`, `tbProcessCliCommand`, simulation, labs, AI Coach, Grade, AI Generate, Fix Challenges, modals, scenario picker, all IDs/ARIA/handlers. **Live-verified via Chrome MCP**: editorial header renders correctly, old `.tb-hero` is `display: none`, stats strip shows "7 devices \u00b7 6 cables \u00b7 Free Build" on empty; loading Home Network scenario auto-updates to "\u00b7 Home Network". **UAT**: **16 new v4.54.4 assertions** \u2014 HTML (4), JS (5), CSS (7). Updated 4 legacy assertions (APP_VERSION + SW cache to 4.54.4, `TB hero` \u2192 `.tb-v2-header`). Total UAT: 3203 \u2192 **3219** passing. Cache: `netplus-v4.54.4`. **10th ship in ~27 hours** (Sunday: Constellation + Results + TB polish). |
| v4.54.3 | **Results page editorial redesign** \u2014 user: *"lets do the results page redesign in order to fit the prototype aesthetics"*. Ports the prototype's Results component. Monospace small-caps eyebrow ("Session \u00b7 complete"), 50px italic-accent display heading ("Crushing <em>it.</em>"), dark scaled-score hero banner, 4-row stats aside, editorial CTA row. **Retired** circular SVG grade-ring + A-F letter \u2014 scaled 100\u2013900 score + pass/fail verdict communicates the same info more usefully for N10-009 prep. **(1) HTML**: `.results-v2` structure with 2-col dark hero \u2014 left: "SCALED SCORE \u00b7 COMPTIA N10-009" mono label + 68px tabular-nums score + verdict pill; right: 4 rows (Correct / Wrong / Raw % / Best streak). Editorial CTA row. Kept `#diff-breakdown`. **(2) JS \u2014 `finish()` updated**: legacy `#grade-fill` / `#grade-letter` / `#grade-pct` writes guarded with `if (el)` so they no-op after retirement. `headlines` map stores HTML with `<em>` accent, rendered via `innerHTML`. New block computes scaled = `Math.max(100, Math.min(900, Math.round(100 + (pct/100) * 800)))`, `passed = scaled >= 720`, populates `#r-v2-score` via `animateCount` (1.1s ease-out), `#r-v2-verdict` with either pass pill ("\u2191 Pass mark cleared \u00b7 720") or fail pill ("\u2193 ${gap} below pass \u00b7 keep going"), `#r-v2-pct` with raw %. **(3) CSS**: eyebrow with leading dash accent, 50px weight-800 `-0.03em` display with italic em flipped to accent-light. Dark hero matches readiness-card-v2: `linear-gradient(160deg, #16131f, #0d0a15)` + radial accent overlay. Score 68px tabular-nums; verdict pill has tier-coloured bg (green pass / red fail). Stats aside has hairline dividers + monospace uppercase `.k` + 22px tabular `.v`. **Force-hide legacy**: `.results-hero/.results-stats/.results-actions { display: none !important }`. **(4) Responsive**: <680px single-col + 38px display + stacked CTAs; <440px further shrink. Reduced-motion kills hero shadow. **Light theme**: hero stays dark (design intent), border + shadow boosted with brand color; eyebrow + em switch to `#6355e0`. **Live-verified via Chrome MCP**: called `finish()` with fail state \u2014 headline rendered "More <em>work needed.</em>", scaled score animated to 100, verdict showed "\u2193 620 below pass \u00b7 keep going" with `.results-v2-verdict-fail` class. **UAT**: **21 new v4.54.3 assertions** \u2014 HTML (7) + JS (7) + CSS (7). Updated 2 version-string assertions (4.54.2 \u2192 4.54.3). Total UAT: 3181 \u2192 **3203** passing. Cache: `netplus-v4.54.3`. **9th ship** in ~26 hours (run: v4.50.0 \u2192 v4.54.3). |
| v4.54.2 | **Knowledge Constellation on Analytics** \u2014 Sunday side-build ("lets build this masterpiece"), ported the Claude Design prototype's single most-novel moment. Topics as floating SVG nodes clustered by domain, sized by practice count, inner-core sized + colored by mastery. Adapted to our 5-domain palette (purple/green/blue/amber/red) instead of the prototype's traffic-light tiers, wired to real `TOPIC_DOMAINS` + `loadHistory()` state. **(1) `_computeConstellationData(h)`**: per-topic aggregation for all 50 `TOPIC_DOMAINS` keys \u2014 attempts, correct, mastery %, tier (mastered \u226585% / proficient \u226570% / developing \u226555% / novice per v4.45.1 thresholds), lastDays. **(2) `_renderAnaConstellation(h)`**: SVG 1000\u00d7440 viewBox with 5 hand-positioned domain cluster anchors. Nodes use **golden-angle spiral** (`angle = i * 2.399 + clusterOffset`, `dist = 42 + (i % 4) * 20`) for deterministic non-overlapping layout. Node radius = `sqrt(attempts)` scale (6\u201322px cap) \u2014 well-studied topics dominate without drowning out fresh ones. Two circles per node: outer `ana-const-halo` at full radius (22% opacity tier color) + inner `ana-const-core` sized to `r * masteryFrac + 2`. **(3) Interaction**: native SVG `<title>` tooltip with topic + domain + mastery% + attempts + last-studied. Click \u2192 `focusTopic()`. **(4) Empty state**: friendly \u2728 icon + "Your constellation will light up as you study". **(5) Tier-based brightness**: mastered gets `brightness(1.25) drop-shadow`, novice dimmed to `opacity: .45`. Starfield background on `.ana-const-map` container (3 radial gradients + linear overlay). **(6) Hover/focus**: halo opacity boosts to .55, core gets extra `drop-shadow` \u2014 nodes "twinkle" on interaction. **(7) Entry animation**: `@keyframes anaConstTwinkle` with `cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1)` overshoot, staggered by domain (.05s / .15s / .25s / .35s / .45s) so 5 clusters pop in sequence. **(8) Legend**: 4 tier dots. **(9) Light-theme**: node colors recoloured to brand variants (#6355e0 / #16a34a / #2563eb / #d97706 / #dc2626), starfield recoloured, cluster-name fill flipped to dark ink. **(10) Reduced-motion**: kills twinkle + hover transitions. **Placement**: inserted into `renderAnalytics()` right after `_renderAnaDomainMastery(h)` \u2014 Domain Mastery shows 5-bar per-domain view, Constellation shows 50-node per-topic view. **Live-verified via Chrome MCP**: seeded 20 topics, verified 50 nodes render with correct per-domain counts (13/13/7/11/6), tier distribution (2 mastered / 8 proficient / 3 developing / 37 novice), tooltips populated, both themes render with correct colors. **UAT**: **18 new v4.54.2 assertions** \u2014 JS (11) + CSS (7). Updated 2 version-string assertions. Total UAT: 3162 \u2192 **3181** passing. Cache: `netplus-v4.54.2`. ~350 LOC. **8th ship in ~24 hours.** |
| v4.54.1 | **Move Recent Performance \u2192 Analytics + extract Settings to own page** \u2014 user's late-Saturday final ask: *"one more thing today"*. Remove the Recent Performance card + Settings details from the home page so it's cleaner; Settings becomes its own sidebar tab. **(1) Recent Performance**: `#history-panel` moved from the bottom of `#page-setup` to the top of `#page-analytics`. `renderHistoryPanel()` removed from `goSetup()` chain; now called from `renderAnalytics()` so it stays in sync. **(2) Settings page**: retired `#advanced-section` `<details>` card on the home page. New `#page-settings` with `max-width: 720px` and 3 `.card.settings-section` blocks \u2014 Anthropic API Key, Backup (Export/Import), Wrong Answers Bank. **(3) Sidebar entry**: new `APP_SIDEBAR_SETTINGS` array + third "Account" sidebar section (below Practice + Drills), `\u2699` icon, routes to the new page. `SIDEBAR_ACTIVE_MAP` + `TOPBAR_CRUMBS` both extended with `'settings'` entries. **(4) Topbar gear**: `scrollToSettings()` rewritten to `showPage('settings')` + `renderSettingsPage()`. **(5)** New `renderSettingsPage()` helper calls `renderWrongBankBtn()` to refresh the count badge. **Test updates**: 10 Playwright tests referenced moved elements (`#api-key` fill, `#history-panel`, `#wrong-bank-clear`, `#page-setup button:has-text("Export")`). Added two helpers `gotoSettings(page)` + `gotoAnalytics(page)` that click the corresponding sidebar entry; tests updated to navigate first OR use `localStorage.setItem('nplus_key', ...)` directly for validation-flow tests (the key value is the real unit under test, not the input mechanism). UAT: **15 new v4.54.1 assertions** \u2014 HTML (5), JS (8), CSS (2). Updated 4 legacy assertions (APP_VERSION/SW cache to 4.54.1, `Advanced collapsible section` \u2192 `Settings page exists`, etc.). Total UAT: 3146 \u2192 **3162** passing. Cache: `netplus-v4.54.1`. **Lesson reinforced**: when DOM elements move between pages, the code + tests + tests' implicit navigation assumptions all need to update in lockstep. |
| v4.54.0 | **Editorial hero v2 + persistent top bar + sidebar collapse** \u2014 user shared a mockup screenshot (dark-on-lavender home layout with display heading "Good afternoon, Alex." + dark readiness aside + full-width purple focus banner + top bar with time/gear/theme/avatar) and said *"i want this exact layout"* + *"the side navigation bar should be able to be hidden by a click"*. 6 shape decisions blessed up front: (1) Replace the legacy setup hero (title + version badge + readiness card + today section) with the v2 display-heading layout; (2) top bar is persistent across ALL pages, not just setup; (3) "Alex" \u2192 "Simi" (from earlier in-session); (4) sidebar collapse is a full hide (not icon-rail), toggle via new topbar button, state persisted in localStorage; (5) readiness card stays DARK in both themes (design intent from the mockup \u2014 amber bar pops against the deep purple-black); (6) focus banner v2 replaces v4.53.0 subtle version with full-width accent-gradient + diagonal stripe texture + giant quote mark + white-pill CTA. **(1) Persistent top bar** (`#app-topbar`, 48px sticky): `.topbar-left` = hamburger toggle (`toggleSidebarCollapsed`) + dynamic breadcrumb (`updateTopbarCrumb` via `showPage` hook, `TOPBAR_CRUMBS` map covers all 21 page ids); `.topbar-right` = live clock (`_topbarTick` updates every 30s w/ day + 12h:MMam/pm) + gear (scrolls to settings & opens `<details>`) + sun/crescent theme toggle (icon mirrors current theme via `MutationObserver` on `data-theme`) + "S" avatar pill (Georgia italic, accent-gradient circle, 30px). **(2) Sidebar collapse** \u2014 `body.sidebar-collapsed` class flips `padding-left` to 0 and translates `.app-sidebar` by `-100%` via `.3s cubic-bezier`. `STORAGE_SIDEBAR_COLLAPSED = 'nplus_sidebar_collapsed'` persists state. Smooth transition both directions. Closes mobile drawer if open. **(3) Setup hero v2** (`.setup-hero-v2`) \u2014 2-col grid (1.45fr + 1fr). **Left**: small-caps monospace date eyebrow ("SATURDAY \u00B7 APRIL 18 \u00B7 10:25PM" built live from `Date`) + 64px weight-800 display heading (`"<greeting>, <span class=\"name\">Simi.</span>"`) with accent-light name and time-aware greeting (Good morning/afternoon/evening/Working late) + 15px lede with inline `<strong>` weak-topic callouts (pulls from `computeWeakSpotScores`, falls back to friendly first-run copy). Text-wrap: balance on the heading keeps the 3-line break natural. **Right aside**: `.readiness-card-v2` dark card (`linear-gradient(160deg, #16131f, #0d0a15)` + radial accent-tint highlight top-right) \u2014 small-caps "EXAM READINESS \u00B7 SCALED 100-900" label, giant 56px weight-800 score + "/900" denom, 6px bar with citron/orange gradient + glow + 720 pass-mark tick (white line at 62.5%), footer delta ("\u2191 +32 this week") + "pass mark 720" label. Below: 2 `.mini-card-v2` tiles (Today daily-goal + Streak 🔥) each with monospace small-caps label + 24px weight-800 tabular value + sub label. **(4) Full-width focus banner v2** (`.focus-banner-v2`) \u2014 purple gradient (`linear-gradient(135deg, accent-deep, accent, electric)`) + diagonal white-stripe texture overlay (`repeating-linear-gradient 135deg`) + 80px Georgia quote mark (25% white) + 19px weight-700 text with citron-accent `<em>fastest</em>` keyword + monospace small-caps meta ("TODAY'S STUDY PLAN \u00B7 ~21 MIN \u00B7 5 TOPICS") + white-pill CTA with accent-deep text "Begin plan \u2192" (pure white bg, hover lifts + arrow glides). **(5) Legacy hero hidden** via `body.hero-v2-active` class which targets `#page-setup .hero, #readiness-card, .daily-goal-card, #streak-badge { display: none }` so the old `<div class="hero">` + `<div id="readiness-card">` + `<div id="daily-goal-card">` stay in the DOM (other code may reference them) but are invisible. **(6) Responsive**: <900px collapses hero grid to single-col + shrinks display heading to 46px + narrows topbar padding; <680px further shrinks heading to 38px + collapses mini-cards to single-col + relayouts focus banner CTA to full-width; <540px hides topbar time. **Reduced-motion**: neutralises topbar transitions + sidebar slide + readiness bar fill + fb-cta hover. **Light-theme overrides** (8 blocks): topbar bg flips to `#F5F4FB` lavender, topbar hovers recoloured, avatar gradient to `#6355e0`, display heading + name + eyebrow + lede strong all swap to `#6355e0`, mini-cards recoloured, focus banner keeps deep-purple gradient (reads well on light bg), fb-cta text to `#4F46E5`. Readiness-card-v2 stays dark in both modes by design. **Live-verified via Chrome MCP** (local dev, SW cleared): topbar breadcrumb updates "Home" \u2192 "Analytics" \u2192 "Home" via sidebar clicks ✓; live clock "Sat \u00B7 10:24pm" ✓; theme toggle flips topbar bg from `rgba(26, 26, 40, .9)` dark to `rgb(245, 244, 251)` lavender ✓; hero display reads "Working late, <em>Simi.</em>" with accent name ✓; eyebrow "SATURDAY \u00B7 APRIL 18 \u00B7 10:25PM" ✓; lede "Yesterday you wobbled on DNS and BGP" from real weak-spots ✓; streak 12 days / longest 18 ✓; focus banner CTA "Begin plan \u2192" ✓; sidebar collapse toggles on/off ✓; legacy hero hidden ✓. **UAT**: **49 new v4.54.0 assertions** \u2014 HTML (9: topbar elements, hero-v2 wrapper + display + readiness card + mini cards + focus-banner-v2 class + legacy hero hidden), JS (14: TOPBAR_CRUMBS \u226520 entries + updateTopbarCrumb + showPage hook + live clock + scrollToSettings + _syncTopbarTheme + STORAGE_SIDEBAR_COLLAPSED + toggleSidebarCollapsed persistence + _initSidebarCollapsed + renderHeroV2 + hero-v2-active class + eyebrow date format + time-aware greeting + renderReadinessCardV2 + bar formula + renderHeroV2MiniCards + goSetup hook + renderSetupFocusBanner v2), CSS (26: sticky topbar + circular avatar gradient + monospace time + body.sidebar-collapsed + translateX + 2-col hero grid + 64px display + accent-light name + dark readiness-card gradient + 56px score + citron bar + mini-card monospace + tabular-nums val + purple focus banner + diagonal stripes + 80px quote + citron em + white pill CTA + responsive <900 + <540 hidden + reduced-motion + 3 light-theme). Version strings updated 4.53.0 \u2192 4.54.0. Total UAT: 3097 \u2192 **3146** passing. Playwright e2e (15/15) green locally. Validation-audit regression gate still green. Cache: `netplus-v4.54.0`. ~650 LOC added across app.js + styles.css + index.html. **Roadmap impact**: ACL v2 roadmap shifts AGAIN by 1 slot \u2014 v4.55 = ACL Fix-This, v4.56 = ACL Cisco CLI, etc. Study buffer now 11+ days before 05-20 exam (still comfortable). |
| v4.53.0 | **Editorial redesign — persistent left sidebar + setup-page polish** — user shared a Claude Design prototype redesign and asked for a Path A+C hybrid: steal the valuable IA + polish bits, keep our dark+light theme support + Inter font + indigo/violet/green/orange brand palette (prototype had pivoted through serif → Space Grotesk → Inter over 4 iterations; user chose to keep our baseline). **7 shape decisions blessed up front** (per v4.48.0 lesson): (1) persistent left sidebar across all 30+ pages, not just setup; (2) 2-section IA (Practice + Drills) with drill sub-items broken out of the old `#page-drills` launcher; (3) 240px fixed rail on desktop, off-canvas drawer w/ hamburger below 900px; (4) SIDEBAR_ACTIVE_MAP centralises page→nav-entry mapping so quiz/exam/review/results all highlight "Home"; (5) focus banner pullquote uses real state (weakest topics via `computeWeakSpotScores`, empty-state fallback); (6) § 01-04 editorial numbered sections; (7) vertical-bar domain grid clicks via existing `drillDomain()`. **(1) Persistent sidebar** (`renderAppSidebar` + `APP_SIDEBAR_PRACTICE` + `APP_SIDEBAR_DRILLS` + `SIDEBAR_ACTIVE_MAP` + `updateSidebarActiveState` + `toggleSidebarMobile`). Structure: gradient N+ brand mark + version string → Practice section (Home / Progress / Analytics / Network Builder / ACL Builder) → Drills section (Subnet Mastery / Port Drill / Acronym Blitz / OSI Sorter / Cable ID — each drill now gets a direct entry instead of being buried in the old Drills launcher) → Footer streak badge (reuses `getStreak()`). Active entry has accent-tinted bg + 3px left rail accent; hover tints. `showPage()` hooked to call `updateSidebarActiveState(name)` on every page switch; mobile drawer auto-closes on navigation. **(2) Setup page restructure**: retired `.setup-nav-group` 6-button row (same entries live in sidebar). Added `#focus-banner` pullquote — real-time greeting ("Good afternoon, Simi" / "Working late, Simi" based on hour; user name "Simi" since this is a single-user app), weakest-topics callout from `computeWeakSpotScores()`, empty-state for first-run. CTA routes to `applyPreset('focused')` for returning users or `'warmup'` for first-run. Giant serif quote mark (Georgia, 64px, 32% opacity). **(3) § 01-04 editorial numbered sections** wrap the existing Quick Start / Marathon Mode / (new) By Domain / Custom Quiz. Each section head: monospace "§ NN" eyebrow in accent-light + large 20px weight-800 title with italic-coloured accent em + right-aligned metadata + dashed accent-tinted underline. **(4) New § 03 By Domain grid** — 5 vertical-bar cells for Concepts / Implementation / Operations / Security / Troubleshooting. Each cell: top 3px domain-palette border (purple/green/blue/amber/red), vertical gradient bar sized to mastery % via `800ms cubic-bezier`, "% exam" weight chip top-right, domain name + big 24px weight-900 percentage + status label (Mastered/Proficient/Developing/Novice per v4.45.1 tier thresholds), click → `drillDomain()`. Grid hidden entirely if history empty. **(5) Readiness pass-mark tick** — vertical 2px line at 62.5% of readiness bar (`(720-420)/(900-420)*100`), with "720" label above + "PASS" label below. `readiness-bar-wrap` now `overflow: visible`. **(6) Mobile responsive**: below 900px, sidebar slides off-canvas (`translateX(-100%)`); hamburger button (`.sb-mobile-toggle`) appears top-left; tap opens drawer with dark backdrop overlay. Body `has-sidebar` class adds 240px left-padding on desktop, removed on mobile. **(7) Light-theme parity**: 15+ `[data-theme="light"]` overrides for every new element — sidebar bg flips from `var(--surface2)` dark purple-black to `#F5F4FB` lavender paper, focus banner gradients recolour to `#6355e0` brand purple. **Accessibility**: `role="navigation"`, aria-labels, reduced-motion neutralises all hover-lifts + transitions + the `focusBannerFadeIn` keyframe. **Live-verified via Chrome MCP** (local dev server, SW cleared): sidebar 10 items render ✓, active state syncs on Home→Analytics→Port Drill→Home navigation ✓, mobile drawer toggles ✓, focus banner greets "Working late, Simi" with weakest-topics callout ✓, all 4 § sections render ✓, 5 domain cells ✓, pass-mark tick at `left: 62.5%` ✓, dark-mode sidebar bg `rgba(26, 26, 40, .9)` ✓, light-mode sidebar bg `rgb(245, 244, 251)` ✓, old `.setup-nav` gone ✓. **UAT**: **51 new v4.53.0 assertions** — HTML (8: #app-sidebar + mobile-toggle + focus-banner + all 4 § section heads + domain-grid + pass-mark at 62.5% + regression on old setup-nav-group), JS (13: two sidebar arrays + renderAppSidebar + SIDEBAR_ACTIVE_MAP + updateSidebarActiveState + showPage hook + toggleSidebarMobile + has-sidebar init + renderSetupFocusBanner + Simi greeting + empty-state + weak-spot integration + renderSetupDomainGrid + TOPIC_DOMAINS aggregation + drillDomain wire + goSetup hook), CSS (30: body has-sidebar padding + fixed sidebar + brand mark gradient + sb-item-active styling + mobile breakpoint + focus banner radial+linear bg + focus-cta gradient + fade-in keyframe + ed-section-num monospace + ed-section-title em accent + dashed underline + pass-tick absolute + 720+PASS labels + overflow:visible + 5-col domain grid + per-idx domain borders + 800ms dg-bar transition + hover translateY + reduced-motion neutralisation + 4 light-theme overrides). Also **repurposed 16 legacy setup-nav assertions** into sidebar references (setup-nav-toolbar → app-sidebar, setup-nav-btn count → APP_SIDEBAR arrays, per-button label checks → sidebar label regex, drills-launcher-btn → retired + per-drill entries present). Version strings updated 4.52.0 → 4.53.0. Total UAT: 3046 → **3097** passing. Validation-audit regression gate still green. Cache: `netplus-v4.53.0`. ~1100 LOC added. Design bundle saved to `.design-reference/` (gitignored). **Roadmap impact**: ACL roadmap shifts by 1 slot; v4.54 = ACL Fix-This, etc. Study buffer still 12+ days before 05-20 exam. |
| v4.52.0 | **ACL / Firewall Rule Builder — new top-level Security-domain sandbox (8 scenarios + Free Build + stateless evaluator + outcome grader + Tier C AI Coach)** — user asked for a second interactive "builder" to complement Topology Builder; product-ideation surfaced Domain 4 Security (14% of exam) as the biggest underserved surface, and ACLs specifically are heavily tested but un-practiced. User picked this from the proposal + green-lit full Option B scope for same-day ship. **7 shape-of-solution decisions settled up front** (per v4.48.0 lesson): (1) generic table syntax — not Cisco CLI; (2) stateless rules; (3) canned + free-form packet tests; (4) new top-level page; (5) outcome-based grading; (6) 8 scenarios + Free Build; (7) Tier C Sonnet Coach cached by rule-list hash. **(1) Evaluator core** (correctness floor, pure functions): `_aclParseCidr(str) → {base, mask}` (uint32 math, normalised to network addr), `_aclIpToUint(ip)` (4-octet uint32), `_aclCidrContains(cidr, ip)` (masked equality), `_aclPortMatches(rulePort, pktPort)` (exact/any/range `1024-65535`), `_aclRuleMatches(rule, pkt)` (proto + src CIDR + srcPort + dst CIDR + dstPort), `_aclEvalPacket(rules, pkt) → {action, ruleIdx, ruleId, implicit}` (first-match-wins walk + final implicit-deny), `_aclGradeScenario(rules, scen) → {passed, total, details[]}` (outcome-based: does actual action match expected for each canned packet). Unit-tested via vm sandbox — 6/6 fixtures pass. **(2) `ACL_SCENARIOS` array** (~430 LOC of authored content): `free-build`, `block-single-host` (beg), `https-only` (beg), `guest-to-hr` (int — east-west VLAN isolation), `dmz-web` (int), `dns-only-lab` (int — containment subnet), `rule-order-trap` (adv — first-match-wins PBQ), `implicit-deny-gotcha` (adv — destination-host permit is NOT blanket permit), `layered-defense` (adv — admin/dev/end-user × dev/staging/prod role-based matrix). Each non-free scenario carries `{id, title, icon, category, difficulty, description, objectives[], zones[], requirements[], testPackets[], explanation{overview, dataFlow, keyDevices[], concepts[], examTies}}`. Test packets are `{src, sp, dst, dp, proto, expected, label}` (3–7 per scenario). **Scenario pedagogy validated** offline: authored a "golden" rule list for each of the 8 scenarios and confirmed via `_aclGradeScenario` that golden passes 100% (39/39 test packets across 8 scenarios); fed WRONG order into rule-order-trap and confirmed grader correctly catches the trap (2/3 fail, finance-host permit denied because broad deny fires first). **(3) Rule CRUD**: `aclAddRule` with default-any fields, `aclDeleteRule`, `aclMoveRule(id, dir)` with FLIP animation trigger, `aclClearRules` + `aclLoadScenario` with dirty-state confirm, `aclLoadState`/`aclSaveState` persist to `STORAGE.ACL_STATE`. Any mutation invalidates `lastGrade`. **(4) Render functions** — split per panel: orchestrator + 5 helpers (header, scenario panel, rule list, test panel, grade panel). Rule list includes an implicit-deny ghost row at the end (red dashed border, explicit "∞ implicit deny" label) + **FLIP reorder animation** via `getBoundingClientRect` capture → `translateY(dy)` → `requestAnimationFrame` release with `cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1)` 420ms transition (matches `renderTodaysFocus` pattern). Test-packet stagger via `animationDelay = i * 80 + 'ms'`. **(5) AI Coach (Tier C)** — reuses `tbCoachTopology` architecture exactly: `_aclRulesHash()` djb2 over `scenarioId::rules-serialized`; `_aclLoadCoachCache`/`_aclSaveCoachCache` with 20-entry LRU cap; prompt includes scenario + requirements + student's rule list + grader output → Sonnet JSON response `{tour, strengths[], concerns[], fixes[], concept}`. Refuses Free Build and empty-rule-list. **(6) 3 modals**: scenario picker (categorised grid: Sandbox / Fundamentals / Real-world / PBQ Traps), add-rule (6-field form), coach (mirror TB coach layout). **(7) Premium UI + 6 animations**: radial + linear gradient card backgrounds, layered shadows, permit pill green / deny pill red throughout, tier-coloured difficulty borders (green beginner / blue intermediate / red advanced), per-zone `--zone-color` CSS-var tinting. Animations: `aclCardFadeIn`, `aclRuleIn` (per-rule slide-in), `aclTpReveal` (test-packet stagger with overshoot), `aclGradePop` (score-number overshoot `cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1)`), `aclModalScaleIn`, `aclLearnFade`. Backdrop blur on modals. Hover-lift on zones / rule-op buttons / picker cards. **Light-theme**: 15+ overrides (scenario cards recoloured to `#6355e0` + `#16a34a`, rule rows, permit pill `#16a34a` / deny pill `#dc2626` for light bg, grade-score tiers, picker cards, modals, learn-more exam highlight). **Responsive**: `@media (max-width: 900px)` collapses 2-col to single-col, `@media (max-width: 600px)` collapses rule-row grid + test-packet grid + grade-detail grid. **Reduced-motion**: neutralises all 6 animations + hover-lifts. **Live-verified via Chrome MCP**: loaded `guest-to-hr`, added 3-rule golden → **5/5 pass** with `acl-grade-score-full` + `acl-grade-score-pop` animation. Loaded `rule-order-trap` with WRONG order → **2/3 fail** with `acl-grade-score-partial` + failing packet correctly identified as "Finance host → Payment (should permit)". Clicked move-up on rule #2 → FLIP animation played → re-graded → **3/3 pass** with full-green styling. Light-theme flipped permit to `rgb(22, 163, 74)` / deny to `rgb(220, 38, 38)`; dark-theme pills `rgb(34, 197, 94)` / `rgb(248, 113, 113)`. **UAT**: **83 new v4.52.0 assertions** — HTML (7), STORAGE keys (2), evaluator function presence (7), **evaluator behavioural sandbox via vm.runInContext** (13 assertions across 5 fixtures: first-match-wins, proto mismatch, port mismatch, empty ACL, CIDR /24, /16-contains-/24 trap math), scenarios (4), state + CRUD (5), render functions (5 incl. FLIP + implicit-deny + stagger), interactions (3), AI Coach (6: Tier C model + hash fn + LRU cap + Free-Build refusal + empty-list refusal + N10-009 prompt context), CSS (31 covering canvas + layout + gradient + shadow + difficulty variants + permit/deny palette + zone-var + 6 keyframes + rule-row grid + tier-score + implicit + modal blur + modal scale-in + hover-lift + responsive + reduced-motion + light-theme). Version strings updated 4.51.0 → 4.52.0. Total UAT: 2965 → **3046** passing. Validation-audit regression gate still green. Cache: `netplus-v4.52.0`. ~2700 LOC added across js + html + css (largest single-release feature since Topology Builder). |
| v4.51.0 | **Topic Progress page revamp — 2 premium summary cards + domain-tinted badges + 5-colour accordion borders** — user: *"i need the topics progress page to be revamped also. Btter cleaner and polsihed UI. High quality"*. Pre-revamp: cramped `.ps-row` single-card summary with 5 cross-bordered stat cells, Labs tacked on below as a 4th row, inline-styled flex header with 3 legend dots, flat grey-on-grey domain accordions with no colour cue, terse `14d ago` dates, objective badges all the same neutral grey. **7 polish changes**: **(1) Cleaner header** — inline-flex replaced by `.progress-header` + `.progress-title` (22px weight-800 with -0.01em tracking). Legend dots moved OUT of the header and INTO the top summary card where they're pedagogically anchored to the Mastery tiles they describe. **(2) Premium 2-card summary** (`_renderProgressSummary` rewrite) — Topic Mastery card (purple accent, `radial + linear` gradient background, layered `0 1px 2px / 0 8px 24px -12px` shadow, 14px corner radius) + Lab Progress card (green accent, same aesthetic, gated on `TB_LABS.length > 0` so it only renders when labs exist). Each card has ico + title + subtitle head row, 8px coverage bar w/ `role="progressbar"` + cubic-bezier `800ms` fill transition + glow shadow, stat tiles below. **(3) Mastery tile grid** — 4-tile grid with emoji ico + big `22px weight-900 tabular-nums` value + uppercase label; tier-coloured (`.ps2-strong` green / `.ps2-solid` blue / `.ps2-weak` red / `.ps2-untouched` grey) with `translateY(-2px)` hover-lift + brighter border on hover. Matches Domain Mastery palette. **(4) Labs tile grid** — auto-fit `minmax(100px)` grid, per-difficulty tiles (`.ps2-diff-beg/int/adv`) with `N/total` value + `Beginner · X%` label. Only renders difficulties with `total > 0`. Subtitle shows `X of N guided labs (Y%)`. **(5) `_progressRowHtml` upgrades** — **(a)** domain-colour tinted objective badges via new `topic-obj-{domainKey}` class: `.topic-obj-concepts` purple / `-implementation` green / `-operations` blue / `-security` amber / `-troubleshooting` red (5-colour palette matching Domain Mastery + Custom Quiz accordions + Recent Performance dots — app-wide visual consistency). **(b)** Friendlier date formatting: `today` / `yesterday` / `3 days ago` / `1 week ago` / `2 weeks ago` / `1 month ago` / `X months ago` replaces the terse `14d ago`. **(c)** Larger 34px circular play button with gradient hover-fill + shadow bloom + cubic-bezier scale. **(6) `_renderProgressGrouped` — 5-colour domain accordions** — each `.progress-domain` now gets `data-domain-idx="1..5"` (+ `data-domain-key` for future JS hooks). CSS paints the left-border 3px accent: purple (Concepts) / green (Implementation) / blue (Operations) / amber (Security) / red (Troubleshooting). Open-chevron colour matches. `.pd-count` badge recoloured to soft accent-tinted pill; `.pd-bar-fill` transition bumped to `800ms cubic-bezier` matching the rest of the progress page. **(7) Toolbar polish** — `.progress-search` gets 10px radius + `3px` focus ring; `.progress-filters` pill group uses 10px radius; `.prog-filter-active` swapped from flat accent to `linear-gradient(135deg)` with soft shadow. **Accessibility**: full `@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)` block neutralises `.ps2-cover-fill`, `.ps2-stat` hover-lift, `.pd-bar-fill`, `.topic-play-btn`, accordion transitions. **Light-theme overrides** cover the new cards (recoloured to `#6355e0` brand purple + `#16a34a` green), `.ps2-*` tiles, `.pd-count`, all 5 `.topic-obj-{domainKey}` tints, active filter button gradient. **Responsive**: narrow viewport ≤600px collapses mastery grid to 2-col, tightens card padding, hides `.pd-weight`, shrinks `.pd-bar` to 48px. **Live-verified via Chrome MCP** against local dev server (SW unregistered + caches cleared): seeded 23 history entries + 3 lab completions, navigated to progress page. Structural: `.progress-header` ✓, mastery + labs cards ✓, 4 mastery tiles ✓, 3 labs tiles ✓, 3 legend items ✓, 5 domain accordions with `data-domain-idx="1..5"` ✓, 50 objective badges rendered with all 5 tint classes present ✓. Computed styles: mastery card has radial-gradient bg + purple border + layered shadow, domain #1 left-border resolves to `rgb(124, 111, 247)`, domain #5 to `rgb(239, 68, 68)`, `.topic-obj-concepts` renders `rgb(167, 139, 250)` on translucent purple. Sample dates rendered as `"yesterday"` and `"3 weeks ago"` — friendly-format path hit correctly. **UAT**: **55 new v4.51.0 assertions** — HTML structure (4: progress-header + progress-title + 2 regression guards on old inline-styled markup); JS (9: both cards emitted, 4-tile grid with tier classes, coverage bar with `role="progressbar"`, labs diff-class map, legend inside mastery card, regression guard on old `.ps-row` grid, domainKey destructure, `topic-obj-${domainKey}` template, friendly-date chain, regression guard on terse date format, `data-domain-idx` + `data-domain-key` on accordions); CSS (42: header + title, premium gradient + box-shadow, green labs card, 8px cover bar + 800ms cubic-bezier fill, 4-col mastery grid, `.ps2-stat:hover` translateY, all 3 tier-coloured `.ps2-stat-val`, 3 legend dot colours, all 5 `data-domain-idx` left-borders exact hex match, all 5 `.topic-obj-{domainKey}` tint rgba, gradient `.prog-filter-active`, gradient `.topic-play-btn:hover`, narrow-viewport 2-col collapse, reduced-motion neutralisation of fill + hover, light-theme card + labs + badges, 2 regression guards on old flat `.progress-summary` + `.ps-lab-row`). Also **repurposed 7 legacy assertions** — `.ps-coverage-bar` → `.ps2-cover-bar`, lab section check → `.progress-card-labs`, `.ps-row` / `.ps-lab-row` / `ps-row` CSS+JS refs → `.ps2-grid-mastery` / `.progress-card-labs` / `ps2-grid`, `Solid emoji is blue circle` regex updated to match `\u{1F535}` in `ps2-solid` context (was html-entity `&#128309;`), `_progressRowHtml destructures trend` regex broadened to tolerate additional destructured fields (`domainKey` added). Version-string assertions updated (4.50.1 → 4.51.0). Total UAT: 2913 → **2965** passing. Validation-audit regression gate still green. Cache bumped to `netplus-v4.51.0`. |
| v4.50.1 | **Deep Scan time corrected (30 \u2192 20 min) + Recent Performance card polish** \u2014 user: *"i dont think it takes 30 mins to do 20 questions... more like 20 mins if im honest"* \u2014 my v4.50.0 time estimates were calibrated at ~40 sec/Q but real exam-level pace is ~1 min/Q. **(1) Time alignment**: "30-min Deep Scan" \u2192 "20-min Deep Scan"; Custom Quiz pills updated to 5Q/~5min, 10Q/~10min, 15Q/~15min, 20Q/~20min (was 3/7/10/13). Consistent across preset + custom builder. **(2) Recent Performance polish** in `renderHistoryPanel`: **(a) Domain-color dot** (8px with 3px halo) on the left of each row, coloured from the 5-domain palette (matches Domain Mastery + Custom Quiz accordions from v4.50.0). Uses `TOPIC_DOMAINS[e.topic]` lookup; "Mixed" topics get neutral grey. **(b) Tier-aligned score colours** at 55/70/85 thresholds (matches v4.45.1 Domain Mastery): \u226585% green, \u226570% brand-purple, \u226555% yellow, <55% red. Previously used 80/60 cutoffs. **(c) Thicker 6px gradient bar** (was 4px) with cubic-bezier transition + inset highlight. **(d) Score pill** redesigned as vertical column \u2014 score (15px bold) on top, percentage (10.5px) below, tabular nums. **(e) Row hover** tints with accent for interactive feedback. **(f) 4-col grid layout** (8px dot / 1fr info / auto score / auto date). **(g) Narrow-viewport \u2264520px** collapses to 3-col + hides date. **Reduced-motion** neutralises hover + bar transition. **UAT**: 15 new v4.50.1 assertions \u2014 Deep Scan label + regression guard, tier thresholds in render, DOMAIN_COLOURS map + TOPIC_DOMAINS lookup, h-score-wrap + h-score-pct, 4-col grid + bar thickness + cubic-bezier + hover + narrow + reduced-motion. Updated 1 v4.50.0 assertion (time estimates) + 1 legacy label check. Version strings updated (4.50.0 \u2192 4.50.1). Total UAT: 2899 \u2192 **2913** passing. Cache: `netplus-v4.50.1`. |
| v4.50.0 | **Custom Quiz UI polish pass** \u2014 user: *"i want a more polished UI for this part here. More Clean and Polished. High quality always."* Pre-revamp: plain H3 headers, Smart/Mixed indistinguishable from topic chips, 5 domain accordions with no colour differentiation, all difficulty pills neutral, bare question counts, standard btn-primary Generate. **6 polish changes**: **(1) Section headers** \u2014 `.cq-section-head` with icon prefix (\ud83e\udde0 Topic / \u26a1 Difficulty / \ud83c\udfaf Questions), uppercase 11px accent-light, hairline underline. **(2) Smart + Mixed dual-card** \u2014 `.cq-mode-card` with 26px icon + bold title + 11.5px subtitle ("AI picks your weak spots" / "Random across all topics"), radial+linear gradient on active, hover-lift \u22121px. **(3) Domain accordions colour-coded** \u2014 5-colour left-borders matching Domain Mastery palette (purple/green/blue/amber/red). Weight badge recoloured to match when open. **(4) Difficulty tier-coloured** \u2014 `.chip-tier-found` green, `.chip-tier-exam` purple, `.chip-tier-hard` red, `.chip-tier-mixed` amber. Outlined inactive / filled active. **(5) Question count cards** \u2014 `.chip-count` with 18px number + 10px time subtitle (~3 / 7 / 10 / 13 min). Active fills with gradient. **(6) Generate Quiz** \u2014 `.cq-generate-btn` with gradient + layered shadow, sparkle icon (`@keyframes cqSparkle`, 2.6s) gated by reduced-motion. **HTML** wraps Difficulty + Questions in `.cq-options-grid` (replaces inline style; collapses at \u2264560px). **Not changed**: `.chip` / `.on` / `data-v` selectors \u2014 applyPreset, startQuiz, topic toggling unchanged. **Accessibility**: `type="button"` added, light-theme override, reduced-motion block neutralises animations. **Live-verified via Chrome MCP**: structural check (3 section heads, 2 mode cards, 5 domain-idx attrs, 4 tier classes, 4 time subtitles) + visual screenshot all pass. **UAT**: 25 new v4.50.0 assertions. Version updated (4.49.4 \u2192 4.50.0). Total UAT: 2874 \u2192 **2899** passing. Cache: `netplus-v4.50.0`. |
| v4.49.4 | **Grade + Coach refuse to run on pristine reference scenarios** \u2014 user asked *"i need a rule that if Scenario build is made, the Grade and Coach buttons shouldnt work for it since its Scenario Build rather than a build i did myself or ai generated"*. Reasoning: grading a reference topology against its own rules is trivially 100% \u2014 not pedagogically useful. Same for Coach. **Fix**: pristine-state detection via ID snapshot. `tbLoadScenarioWithBuild` captures `tbState.pristineScenarioId`, `pristineDeviceIds` (sorted), `pristineCableIds` (sorted) after `scen.autoBuild` runs. `tbIsPristineScenario()` helper compares current device+cable ID lists to the snapshot \u2014 identical means untouched, any add/remove means modified. Moving or config-editing does NOT flip the flag (topology shape unchanged = still the reference). **Grade + Coach handlers** both start with `if (tbIsPristineScenario()) { showErrorToast(...); return; }`. Grade: *\u2018X is a reference scenario \u2014 it matches itself by design. Modify the canvas (add/remove a device or cable) to grade your own build, or pick Free Build to start fresh.\u2019* Coach points to the built-in "Learn more" deep-dive. **Not gated**: AI-generated topologies (no pristineScenarioId is set), user-drawn Free Build, and Fix-a-network challenges \u2014 those grade/coach as before. **Live-verified via Chrome MCP**: Home Network load \u2192 pristine=true; Grade click \u2192 toast fired with correct message; device add \u2192 pristine=false; Free Build \u2192 pristine=false. **UAT**: 8 new v4.49.4 assertions. Version strings updated (4.49.3 \u2192 4.49.4). Total UAT: 2860 \u2192 **2868** passing. Cache: `netplus-v4.49.4`. |
| v4.49.3 | **AI Generate shows green packets too \u2014 auto-assign helper extracted + wired into tbBuildFromAiPayload** \u2014 user asked *"and you made sure this worked for the AI generated button too?"* after v4.49.2 landed. Honest answer: no \u2014 v4.49.2\u2019s auto-assign lived inside `_tbMkCable` (used by scenario autoBuild), but `tbBuildFromAiPayload` constructs cables with a raw loop that never called it. `TB_NO_IP_NEEDED` is global so AI-gen topologies were partially helped, but router-to-router AI cables still showed red. **Fix**: extracted the auto-assign logic into a shared `_tbAutoAssignCableIps(aDev, aIfc, bDev, bIfc, cableType)` helper. Both entry points (`_tbMkCable` for scenarios, `tbBuildFromAiPayload` for AI) now call it, so behaviour stays identical. Also added `_tbLinkLocalSlot = 0` reset at the start of `tbBuildFromAiPayload` so each AI generation gets a clean link-local pool starting at 169.254.1.1 (same convention as scenarios). **UAT**: 4 new v4.49.3 assertions \u2014 shared helper defined, `_tbMkCable` delegates to it, `tbBuildFromAiPayload` resets counter, `tbBuildFromAiPayload` calls helper on each cable. Also repurposed 2 v4.49.2 assertions (the auto-assign \u00b5s were inlined in _tbMkCable, now expected inside `_tbAutoAssignCableIps`). Version strings updated (4.49.2 \u2192 4.49.3). Total UAT: 2856 \u2192 **2860** passing. Validation-audit regression gate still green. Cache bumped to `netplus-v4.49.3`. |
| v4.49.2 | **Scenarios show green packets \u2014 zero blocked/red cables across 31 scenarios** \u2014 user flagged *"Red packets mean there is something wrong with the network configuration right? So how comes in almost all the scenarios, Labs, and AI generates networks there is red packets? Surely the red packets should only exist in the Fix a network activity."* User\u2019s mental model 100% correct. **Three distinct bugs compounded**: (1) `TB_NO_IP_NEEDED` had only 3 entries (switch/dmz-switch/cloud) \u2014 any scenario using WAPs, modems, cell-towers, satellites, SAN arrays, WLCs, ISP-routers, or cloud-logical nodes (VPC/subnet/IGW/NAT-GW/TGW/VPG/SASE/on-prem-DC) flagged those cables as blocked because those devices had no IPs; (2) `_tbMkCable` with default indices `(0, 0)` silently overwrote `cableId` on shared interfaces \u2014 multiple cables attached to the same hub router all wrote to `iface[0]`, leaving all but the last cable with severed interface references; (3) scenarios passing EXPLICIT `aIdx=1` hit interfaces already claimed by earlier auto-picked cables, same silent overwrite. **Fix \u2014 4 changes**: **(1) Expanded `TB_NO_IP_NEEDED`** from 3 to 18 types, organised by role: L2 bridges (switch, dmz-switch, wap), cloud + cloud-abstraction (cloud, vpc, cloud-subnet, igw, nat-gw, tgw, vpg, sase-edge, onprem-dc), transit/broadband/radio (modem, cell-tower, satellite, isp-router), storage fabric (san-array), wireless mgmt (wlc). **(2) Auto-assign link-local IPs** in `_tbMkCable` so any L3 interface without an IP gets one automatically: L3\u2194L3 pair gets matching `/30` link-local (`169.254.N.X` and `+1`); L3\u2194exempt gets a `/24` one-sided assignment on the L3 side (`169.254.10+N.X/24`). Matches RFC 3927 APIPA convention. Console cables skipped. **(3) `nextFreeIdx` + `resolveIdx` helpers** in `_tbMkCable`: when no explicit index passed, scan for first interface without a `cableId` (or create one); when explicit index clashes with an already-attached slot, fall forward to next free. Stops silent overwrites without requiring scenario authors to hand-track interface indices. **(4) `_tbLinkLocalSlot` counter reset** in `tbLoadScenarioWithBuild` before each autoBuild runs \u2014 deterministic IP assignments on scenario re-load. **Cable health scoring** itself unchanged \u2014 `fromHasIp = fromIfc?.ip || fromExempt` formula still works; we just widened "exempt" and filled more `ip`s. **Live-verified via Claude-in-Chrome MCP across all 31 scenarios**: 255 total cables tested via `tbAssessCableHealth(cable)`. Results: **232 flowing** (91%), **0 blocked** (was ~94 before fix), **23 degraded** (9%, concentrated in scenarios where subnets intentionally differ and routing would be needed \u2014 DSL/cable/FTTH with separate home+ISP subnets, point-to-point leased lines between different site networks, hub-spoke with per-branch subnets. These are **pedagogically correct amber** \u2014 "traffic works but needs a router to bridge"). Zero red packets means the **red-packet-as-misconfig-signal is now trustworthy**: user sees red after editing a scenario \u2192 they know they actually broke something. **UAT**: 14 new v4.49.2 assertions \u2014 new exempt entries, `_tbLinkLocalSlot` counter + reset, auto-assign `/30` formula, `assignSide` helper for one-sided case, console-cable skip, `/30` pool stepping by 4, `tbAssessCableHealth` unchanged regression guard. Version strings updated (4.49.1 \u2192 4.49.2). Total UAT: 2840 \u2192 **2856** passing. Validation-audit regression gate still green. Cache bumped to `netplus-v4.49.2`. |
| v4.49.1 | **Topology Builder "How to build" UI revamp \u2014 4 cramped items \u2192 5 focused step cards** \u2014 user flagged: *"we need a rehig of the UI for the 'how to Build' Part please. UI revamp as im still not satisified with it. High quality please."* Screenshot showed Step 4 was mangled \u2014 cramming 3 separate concepts ("Drag to move", "Del to remove", "Ping/ARP/DHCP simulate") into one cell with the text wrapping awkwardly at mid-viewport widths (single words like "move" / "remove" / "Use" / "toolbar" on separate lines). **3 problems fixed**: (1) Step 4 doing too much; (2) old `minmax(240px, 1fr)` grid forced awkward narrow-card wrapping with overflowing inline `<strong>` tags; (3) flat identical cards, numbered badge inline with prose, no icons, `<kbd>Del</kbd>` buried between middle-dots. **Revamp**: each step now a dedicated card with numbered badge top-left, emoji icon top-right, bold action title (15px accent-light), description (12.5px text-mid) with `<em>` emphasis + `<strong>` key terms. **5 new step cards**: **1 \ud83d\uddb1\ufe0f Drag** \u2014 Pick a device from the palette and drop it onto the canvas; **2 \ud83d\udd17 Wire** \u2014 Click device *A*, then click device *B* to draw a cable between them; **3 \u2699\ufe0f Configure** \u2014 Double-click a device to set IPs, VLANs, routing, DHCP & CLI; **4 \u270b Move & Delete** \u2014 Drag any device to reposition.
